ResearchProjectDef.label: United Front Weapon Manufacturing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced weaponry used by United Front settlers. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Mercenary Armaments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced weaponry favored by United Front pirates and mercenaries. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Polymer Weaponry
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced weaponry fielded by Dominion armed forces. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: High-Frequency Vibration Generators
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct weapons that use ultrasonic vibration generators. Note that these also require advanced components.
